globalEvents.title: 3 Jet Destruction Raises Alarm Over Military Surveillance Gap
globalEvents.detail: The US E-3 Jet destruction in an Iranian strike on a Saudi air base is sending shockwaves through defense circles, with analysts warning it could weaken Washington’s ability to detect and respond to distant threats. Wreckage at Strategic Air Base Striking images circulating online—and later verified—show the shattered remains of a Boeing E-3 Sentry at US E-3 Jet destruction weakens surveillance after Iranian strike on Saudi air base assets

globalEvents.title: What could Trump achieve by threatening Iran's Kharg Island?
globalEvents.detail: It has no oil wells, but it has Iran's largest oil terminal, pipelines and storage tanks as well as military facilities.

globalEvents.title: Jerusalem Tensions Flare: Cardinal's Holy Sepulchre Entry Blocked, Then Reversed
globalEvents.detail: Israel initially blocked Jerusalem's Catholic cardinal from marking Palm Sunday at the Church of the Holy Sepulchre due to security concerns related to the Iran war. International backlash prompted Prime Minister Netanyahu to reverse the decision, reinstating access for Holy Week. Critics included leaders from Italy, France, and the Vatican.

globalEvents.title: Early government modelling assumes fuel rationing when stockpile falls to 10 days' diesel supply
globalEvents.detail: Diesel stocks would last about six months if Australia's imports dropped by 20 per cent, according to modelling compiled for the federal government early in the Middle East war.

globalEvents.title: acre wildfire containment efforts ahead of red flag conditions in New Mexico
globalEvents.detail: Fire crews are working to contain the 282-acre Sago Fire on the Mescalero Apache Reservation as the National Weather Service forecasts high winds and possible red flag conditions later this week in southern New Mexico.

globalEvents.title: LA Utility Taps Muni Market as Buyers Weigh Wildfire Legal Risk
globalEvents.detail: Los Angeles’ water and power utility is tapping the municipal bond market with its first offering since a judge ruled last month that the utility must face hundreds of lawsuits faulting its response to the devastating 2025 Palisades Fire.

globalEvents.title: Engine Fire Forces Delta Flight To Make Emergency Landing In Brazil's Sao Paulo
globalEvents.detail: Delta A330-300 flight makes emergency landing in Brazil's Sao Paulo after its left engine failure sends flames and sparks shooting, prompting the crew to initiate an emergency landing.

globalEvents.title: 'Five alarm fire': Megyn Kelly shocked at Trump's lowest approval rating; 'We need to get out of Iran'
globalEvents.detail: US News: Conservative commentator Megyn Kelly who has been strongly condemning President Donald Trump's war in Iran said the lowest approval rating of the pres.

globalEvents.title: Dear Chase Elliott Fans: Stop Trying to Fire Alan Gustafson
globalEvents.detail: It's time to respect Alan Gustafson a little bit more, and stop calling for him to be replaced atop the pit box of the No. 9.

globalEvents.title: Man shot dead in border village in Amritsar
globalEvents.detail: Amritsar, Mar 30 (PTI) A man was shot dead from point blank range by unidentified assailants in a border village in Amritsar on Monday, police said. The deceased, identified as Sohna Singh, was going from Rajatal to Khera village when the assailants intercepted and opened fire on him from point blank range, they said. He […]

globalEvents.title: 2 criminals injured in police encounter in Dwarka
globalEvents.detail: Dwarka police encounter in Delhi leaves two injured after exchange of fire while officers tried to arrest a Dabri crime suspect; both shot in legs, hospitalized.

globalEvents.title: What's Going On With Snap Stock Monday?
globalEvents.detail: Snap faces EU probe into illegal content and grooming risks. Shares trade near $4 support as investors weigh regulatory headwinds.

globalEvents.title: 2026 recession fears rise - new data signals trouble ahead for the US economy
globalEvents.detail: US recession outlook 2026: New data suggests the US economy may be in trouble, with recession fears growing as stock markets slide. Investors are facing uncertainty with rising risks of an economic slowdown in 2026.

globalEvents.title: Stock Market Outlook: S&P 500 Flashing 'Ominous' Signs More Losses Coming
globalEvents.detail: A cluster of trend indicators in the S&P 500 have flashed a "sell" signal or are moving closer to bearish territory, according to Ned Davis Research.

globalEvents.title: What's Going On With Bloom Energy Stock Monday?
globalEvents.detail: BE stock plummets 11% amid rising Iran tensions and $101 oil. Is Bloom Energy's growth story at risk? Get the full market breakdown.

globalEvents.title: Nvidia sell-off extends to third day; stock down 21% from recent peak amid market jitters
globalEvents.detail: Nvidia shares fell 1% to $166.21, marking a 6% decline in March and 21% drop from November 2025 high. Concerns over AI revenue sustainability and broader tech sell-off amid geopolitical tensions weigh on the sector, with Nasdaq 100 entering correction territory.

globalEvents.title: 50 per cent of Australians avoid health care they need due to cost, according to Consumers Health Forum report
globalEvents.detail: One in two Australians missed out on health care they needed last year mainly because they could not afford it, according to a new report by the peak healthcare consumers group.

globalEvents.title: Study finds screen time among children and adolescents has increased over 3 decades-especially after COVID-19
globalEvents.detail: The first systematic review to track long-term trends across pre- and post-pandemic periods finds a dramatic rise in screen use among children and adolescents. Screen time among children and adolescents has increased significantly over the past three decades, with a clear rise occurring after the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic, according to a new systematic review conducted at the University of Turku, Finland.

globalEvents.title: Student, 15, Shoots Texas High School Teacher
globalEvents.detail: The teacher was taken to a hospital, and the student died at the scene, the authorities said.

globalEvents.title: New COVID variant in 25 states: ‘Cicada’
globalEvents.detail: New variant poses challenge to vaccine effectiveness

globalEvents.title: Health workers celebrated: Gumla honors 46 sahiyas, 33 CHOs for exceptional health service; Efforts noted in lowering maternal and infant mortality rates
globalEvents.detail: Gumla: The state health department felicitated 46 sahiyas, 33 community health officers and and auxiliary nurse midwives for their work at an event he.

globalEvents.title: Lehigh Valley Hospital cited for failing to hand pepper-sprayed patient over to police
globalEvents.detail: A Pennsylvania Department of Health report details the Sept. 14 incident

globalEvents.title: Emmerdale fans 'rumble' who poisoned Kim - and it's not Cain or Joe
globalEvents.detail: Emmerdale viewers think they know which character has poisoned Kim Tate leading to her hospital dash on the ITV soap, with suspects including Cain Dingle and Joe Tate

globalEvents.title: Crumbling ceilings haunt RG Kar hostels, students lodge protest
globalEvents.detail: Kolkata: Reports of concrete falling off from the ceiling of a toilet in the RG Kar Medical College & Hospital women's hostel have put the spotlig.

globalEvents.title: Reckless biker prompts clash in Jadavpur locality
globalEvents.detail: Kolkata: There was tension in the Jamunanagar area of east Jadavpur after two groups clashed with one another, following a protest lodged by a youth a.

globalEvents.title: CPI(M) Challenges FCRA Amendment Bill, 2026: A Fight for Constitutional Morality
globalEvents.detail: The CPI(M) has demanded the withdrawal of the Foreign Contribution (Regulation) Amendment Bill, 2026, warning it poses excessive government control and diminishes federalism. They stress the bill's potential to target NGOs unjustly, threatening civil society and minority institutions, and advocate for a regulatory framework aligned with democratic principles.

globalEvents.title: Mumbai Coastal Road News: BMC Reverses Melody Road Decision; Open By Day, Shut At Night After Residents’ Protest
globalEvents.detail: The BMC has revised its decision on Mumbai’s melody road, allowing daytime access while restricting it at night following resident complaints over noise and acoustic disturbance. The ₹6 crore project continues to face opposition, even as plans emerge to introduce similar musical strips on the Samruddhi Expressway.

globalEvents.title: Martin Family Enters Politics: Wife, Son, Son-in-Law Contest Elections in Tamil Nadu & Puducherry
globalEvents.detail: The family of lottery baron Santiago Martin today resembles a diversified political portfolio. Martin’s wife, Leema Rose Martin, is AIADMK’s candidate.

globalEvents.title: CPI(ML) Liberation Slams Government's Anti-Communist Rhetoric
globalEvents.detail: The Communist Party of India (Marxist-Leninist) Liberation criticized the government for using parliamentary discussion to smear the communist movement. General Secretary Dipankar Bhattacharya accused the administration of ideological attacks and pledged resistance against what he sees as an agenda against communism perpetuated by the government.

globalEvents.title: Spanish bishops and government sign deal for compensation of church sexual abuse victims
globalEvents.detail: MADRID (AP) — Spain's Catholic bishops and the Spanish government took another step Monday toward compensating victims of sexual abuse by clergy members who…

adminEvents.title: WAR/POLITICS - 2026 Mar
adminEvents.detail: Ukraine war escalation continues across Eastern Europe as multiple drone incidents were recorded across Baltic airspace in late March 2026, with at least 3 confirmed airspace violations reported by Lithuania, Latvia, and Estonia within a 48-hour window, intensifying NATO air-defense readiness along the 1,450 km eastern flank.

adminEvents.title: TECHNOLOGY - 2026 Mar
adminEvents.detail: Agentic AI transition accelerates in 2026, with over 60% of new enterprise AI deployments shifting from generative models to autonomous task-executing systems, while more than 12 major countries expand “digital sovereignty” policies aimed at controlling AI infrastructure, including GPU allocation exceeding 10,000 H100-equivalent units in national compute programs.

adminEvents.title: ECONOMIC - 2026/Mar
adminEvents.detail: Global economic fragmentation deepens as analysts describe a persistent K-shaped recovery, with household debt linked to buy-now-pay-later services exceeding double-digit annual growth rates in multiple OECD economies, while supply-chain volatility affects more than 30% of critical manufacturing inputs across semiconductor and energy sectors.
